steps.title: Write the bus time
steps.content: Walking takes $24$ minutes. Taking the bus takes $w$ minutes of waiting plus $6$ minutes of riding, for a total of $w+6$ minutes.

steps.title: Compare the two routes
steps.content:
Walking is faster when the walking time is less than the total bus time. That means the $24$-minute walk must take less time than waiting for the bus and then riding it.
$$24Equivalently,
$$w+6>24$$
This matches the inequality that says the bus trip would take more than $24$ minutes. The answer is D.
